mapper.insert: INSERT INTO company (name, industry, scale, nature, address, contact_name, contact_phone, contact_email, license_url, description) VALUES (#{name}, #{industry}, #{scale}, #{nature}, #{address}, #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, #{contactEmail}, #{licenseUrl}, #{description})
mapper.update: UPDATE company SET name = #{name}, industry = #{industry}, scale = #{scale}, nature = #{nature}, address = #{address}, contact_name = #{contactName}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, contact_email = #{contactEmail}, license_url = #{licenseUrl}, description = #{description} WHERE id = #{id}
